rule_metadata.name: sudoers
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'sudoers' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule sudoers
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'sudoers' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "sudoers"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /echo\s.{0,1000}\sALL\=\(ALL\)\sNOPASSWD\:\sALL.{0,1000}\s\>\>\/etc\/sudoers/
		$string2 = /echo\s.{0,1000}\sALL\=NOPASSWD\:\s\/bin\/bash.{0,1000}\s\>\>\/etc\/sudoers/

	condition:
		any of them
}
